title: rosa canina var. avelloi
intro: Rosa canina var. avelloi, also known as the Aveloi rose, is a specific variety of the wild rose plant. It is a shrub-like plant with thorny stems and fragrant, pink flowers. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. avelloi are attributed to its high content of vitamin C and flavonoids, which are known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
